old: Post-translational modifications such as LSD1-mediated demethylation lead to functional alterations in prostate cancer.
new: Post-translational modifications such as LSD1-mediated demethylation can modulate FOXA1 activity in prostate cancer.

old: FOXA1 mutant-targeted inhibitors require further evaluation.
new: Identifying inhibitors that antagonize specific FOXA1 mutants potentiates personalized treatment.
